PN CN114890885-A
TI Green synthesis process for salicylic acid, by            e.g. obtaining sodium phenol solution, generating            sodium salicylate; decompression flash evaporation,            solid-liquid separating solid phase and liquid phase,            crystallizing, drying solid phase material, condensing            gas phase material, and acetone leaching.
AU WANG D
   XU W
AE UNIV YANGZHOU (UYYZ-C)
GA 2022A76031
AB    NOVELTY - Green synthesis process for salicylic acid,                comprises e.g. obtaining sodium phenol solution,                phenol sodium solution and carbon dioxide                gas-liquid dispersion mixing, generating sodium                salicylate; subjected material to decompression                flash evaporation operation, cooling and                condensing, gas-liquid separating the material and                entering carboxylation reaction, generating                salicylic acid and sodium sulfate, evaporating,                leaching solid phase material by taking acetone as                leaching agent, carrying out solid-liquid                separation in the solid-liquid separating device;                decoloring and impurity removing, solid-liquid                separating, evaporating and crystallizing liquid                phase material; condensing gas phase material,                solid-liquid separating solid phase and liquid                phase, entering evaporation crystallization, drying                solid phase material, condensing gas phase                material, entering acetone leaching step and                obtaining solid phase material is salicylic acid                product.
   USE - Green synthesis process for salicylic                acid.
   ADVANTAGE - The method realizes by-product sodium sulfate,                realizes the resource utilization of solvent and                waste water simultaneously. The method fully uses                the particularity of substance characteristics and                process, reasonable technique, simple operation,                unit operation are sealed circulating system,                environment-friendly, and easy to realize                continuous operation, especially suitable for large                scale production salicylic acid is a salicylic acid                development requirement of cleaning production                process technology.
   DETAILED DESCRIPTION - Green synthesis process for salicylic acid,                which uses sodium phenate, carbon dioxide and                sulfuric acid as raw materials, adopts gas-liquid                carboxylation reaction, sulfuric acid                acidification, evaporative dehydration, acetone                leaching, and evaporative crystallization coupling                technology, comprises: (1) in the sodium phenol                solution preparation device, dissolving the sodium                phenol in the organic solvent phenol solution to                obtain the sodium phenol solution, the volume ratio                of the mass of the sodium phenol in the solution                and the acetone is 1 kg: 4 l to 1 kg: 10 l; (2) in                the efficient gas-liquid dispersion mixing reactor,                the phenol sodium solution and carbon dioxide                gas-liquid dispersion mixing, phenol sodium and                carbon dioxide carboxylation reaction to generate                sodium salicylate; (3) in the decompression flash                evaporation device, the material after the last                carboxylation reaction is subjected to                decompression flash evaporation operation, the                solid phase material obtained by vacuum extracting                and flashing operation to enter the sixth step                acidification reaction step, the gas phase material                enters the next step; (4) in the cooling and                condensing device, cooling and condensing the gas                phase material obtained in the last step, the                condensed material enters the next step; (5) in the                gas-liquid separating device, the material obtained                in the last step is subjected to gas-liquid                separation, the gas phase material enters the                second step carboxylation reaction step as the                reaction raw material carbon dioxide, the liquid                phase material acetone enters the first step                solution preparation step as solvent for recycling,                (6) dispersing and mixing the solid phase material                sodium salicylate obtained by vacuum extracting and                flashing the third step with the sulfuric acid                aqueous solution, the sodium salicylate is                acidified to generate the salicylic acid and sodium                sulfate, the material after reaction enters the                next step; (7) in the evaporating and dehydrating                device, the material after the sodium salicylate                and sulfuric acid acidification is subjected to                evaporation operation, the water obtained by gas                phase material condensation is further used and                processed, the solid phase material enters the next                step; (8) in the leaching device, the solid phase                material of the last step is leached by taking                acetone as leaching agent, the salicylic acid in                the leaching phase is leached, (9) carrying out                solid-liquid separation in the solid-liquid                separating device by the material after leaching                operation, the solid phase material is sodium                sulfate, separating and refining to obtain                by-product sodium sulfate, the liquid phase                material enters the next step; (10) in the                decoloring and impurity removing device, the                decoloring and removing impurity agent added to the                liquid phase material obtained in the last step for                decoloring and removing impurity, the material                after decoloring and impurity removing operation                enters the next step; (11) in the solid-liquid                separating device, solid-liquid separating the                material obtained by decoloring and impurity                removing operation, the liquid phase material                enters the thirteenth step evaporation                crystallization step, the solid phase material                enters the next step; (12) in the decoloring and                impurity removing and impurity agent removing                processing device, the solid-phase material                obtained in the last step is directly used as the                decoloring and impurity removing agent of the tenth                step decoloring and impurity removing step after                the regeneration treatment; (13) evaporating and                crystallizing the liquid phase material obtained by                solid-liquid separation in the eleventh step, the                solid phase and liquid phase material obtained by                evaporation enter the fifteenth step solid liquid                separation step, the gas phase material enters the                next step; (14) condensing the gas phase material                obtained by the previous step of evaporation as the                leaching agent the eighth step of the acetone                leaching step to use; (15) in the solid-liquid                separating device, solid-liquid separating the                solid phase and liquid phase obtained in the                thirteenth step evaporation crystallization step,                liquid phase material entering the thirteenth step                evaporation crystallization step, solid phase                material entering the next step; and (16) in the                drying device, drying the solid phase material                obtained in the previous step, after condensing the                gas phase material, entering the eighth step of                acetone leaching step as leaching agent the solid                phase material is salicylic acid product.
TF TECHNOLOGY FOCUS - ORGANIC CHEMISTRY - Preferred Method: The high efficiency                  gas-liquid dispersion mixing device in the second                  step of phenol sodium carboxylation reaction is a                  static mixer and a jet mixer, Venturi mixer, the                  molar ratio of phenol sodium and carbon dioxide                  in the carboxylation reaction is 1.0: 1.2 to 1.0:                  2.0, the reaction pressure is 0.4-0.8 MPa, the                  reaction temperature is 80-120&#176;C. The                  third step decompression flash evaporation device                  is any one of flash evaporation tank or flash                  evaporation cooler or flash evaporation tower,                  the absolute pressure of operation is 0.02-0.08                  MPa. In acetone leaching process, the leaching                  obtains the quality of salicylic acid and the                  volume of leaching agent acetone, ratio is                  1.0kg:2.0 l to 1.0kg:8 l. In the sixth step of                  acidification reaction, the concentration of                  sulfuric acid is 0.2-2 mol/l, the pH value of the                  solution after acidification reaction is 5-7. In                  decoloring and impurity removing process, the                  decoloring and removing impurity agent molecular                  sieve or activated carbon and/or diatomite is                  used, the adding amount is 1-5% of the mass of                  the organic phase material. In the ninth step,                  the tenth step and the fifteenth step                  solid-liquid separation process, the solid-liquid                  separating device is any one of sedimentation                  type or filter type or centrifugal type or blade                  type solid-liquid separating device. The third                  step decompression flash evaporation device is                  any one of flash evaporation tank or flash                  evaporation cooler or flash evaporation tower,                  the absolute pressure of operation is 0.02-0.08                  MPa. The fifth step of the gas-liquid separating                  device is oil-water separator or liquid-gas                  separator or sofitel gas-water separator.

AB    NOVELTY - Manufacture of catalyst structure involves (A)                preparing a powder composition comprising an                alkaline earth metal-containing raw material                containing an alkaline earth metal, an                aluminum-containing raw material containing                aluminum, and a silica-containing raw material                containing 20 %mass or more silica, in which at                least one of the alkaline earth metal-containing                raw material and the aluminum-containing raw                material generates a pyrolysis gas when fired, (B)                forming and sintering the powder composition to                obtain a porous ceramic comprising a porous                structure, a crystalline phase of metal oxide, a                crystalline phase of alumina and a crystalline                phase of aluminosilicate, and (C) supporting metal                particles as a catalyst on the porous                ceramics.
   USE - Manufacture of catalyst structure for gas                production method (claimed) for chemical reactions                such as dry reforming reactions and ammonia                decomposition reactions.
   ADVANTAGE - The method provides catalyst structure having                a large specific surface area and excellent heat                resistance.
   DETAILED DESCRIPTION - Manufacture of catalyst structure involves (A)                preparing a powder composition for a base material,                comprising an alkaline earth metal-containing raw                material containing an alkaline earth metal, an                aluminum-containing raw material containing                aluminum, and a silica-containing raw material                containing 20 %mass or more silica, in which at                least one of the alkaline earth metal-containing                raw material and the aluminum-containing raw                material generates a pyrolysis gas when fired, (B)                forming and sintering the powder composition to                obtain a porous ceramic comprising a porous                structure, a crystalline phase of metal oxide (MO),                where M is an alkaline earth metal, a crystalline                phase of alumina and a crystalline phase of                aluminosilicate, and (C) supporting metal particles                as a catalyst on the porous ceramics. The gas production method                  involves contacting the catalyst structure with a                  raw material gas containing ammonia gas to                  produce cracked gas containing hydrogen gas and                  nitrogen gas. Preferred Components: The base                  powder composition further comprises at least one                  of hydrotalcite as the alkaline earth                  metal-containing raw material and ammonium                  dawsonite as the aluminum-containing raw                  material.

PN CN114939141-A
TI Chinese medicine composition useful for removing            tear stains of pet, comprises animal bile, cassia            seeds, Chinese yam, marigold, medlar, Eucommia bark,            liquorice, millet and honeysuckle.
AU QIAN Z
AE SHENZHEN HUASHENGHANG TRADING CO LTD (SHEN-Non-standard)
GA 2022B6200A
AB    NOVELTY - Chinese medicine composition comprises 30-50                pts. wt. animal bile, 5-10 pts. wt. cassia seeds,                10-20 pts. wt. Chinese yam, 5-15 pts. wt. marigold,                10-15 pts. wt. medlar, 15-20 pts. wt. Eucommiabark,                1-5 pts. wt. liquorice, 3-7 pts. wt. millet and                8-12 pts. wt. honeysuckle.
   USE - The Chinese medicine composition is useful for                removing tear stains of pet.
   ADVANTAGE - The traditional Chinese medicine composition                continuously protects pet's liver and gallbladder,                achieves effect of continuously and efficiently                preventing and reducing the pet's tear stains,                treats pet tear marks from the root, has high                utilization rate, realizes one-time medication for                pets, has long-term effect, effectively prolongs                medication cycle of pets, and avoids deterioration                of drug resistance and toxic and side effects of                drugs in pets.
   DETAILED DESCRIPTION - An INDEPENDENT CLAIM is also included for                preparation method of the Chinese medicine                composition for removing tear stains of pet,                comprising (1) refluxing and extracting the animal                bile, obtaining bile extract, processing the bile                extract, and obtaining hydrophilic bile acid, (2)                providing the chitosan and hydrophilic bile acid as                raw material, synthesizing the grafted chitosan                acid derivative, and crushing cassia seed,                mulberry, marigold, medlar, Eucommia bark,                liquorice, millet, honeysuckle to obtain the                traditional Chinese medicine powder, and using                supercritical carbon dioxide extraction technology                to extract to obtain traditional Chinese medicine                extracting solution, adding grafted chitosan acid                derivative into the traditional Chinese medicine                extracting solution, and mixing uniformly to obtain                medicament, and (3) dissolving in ternary solvent                composed of ethanol and water, completely                dissolving, dialyzing in the deionized water to                obtain silk fibroin solution, the silk fibroin is                calcium chloride, and uniformly mixing the silk                fibroin solution and sodium alginate solution to                obtain mixed solution, adding the medicament into                the mixed solution, injecting into the mold,                processing gelation by 300-500W ultrasonic                treatment, obtaining the composite hydrogel,                freezing, drying, and grinding into powder to                obtain product.
TF TECHNOLOGY FOCUS - BIOLOGY - Preferred Components: The animal bile is at                  least one of chicken bile, duck bile and goose                  bile.Preferred Method: In the step (1), the                  specific extracting method of the bile extract as                  follows: adding 20-30 g animal bile in container,                  adding 100-150 ml petroleum ether, heating and                  refluxing at 50-60&#8451; for 2-3 hours,                  filtering and removing the filter residue,                  repeating for 3-5 times, adding the filtrate in                  the container, adding methanol with 8-10 times                  volume of the filtrate, heating and refluxing at                  78-83&#8451; for 1-2 hours, filtering and                  removing the filtrate, adding 1-5 g                  montmorillonite, heating and refluxing at                  78-83&#8451; for 2-3 hours, filtering and                  removing the filtrate, repeating for 3-5 times,                  steaming the filtrate to liquid-solid ratio of                  3-4, and crystallizing at-4 to -0&#8451; to                  obtain the bile extract. In the step (1), the                  processing method of the bile extract is                  specifically as follows: (1a) adding bile extract                  anhydrous methanol, heating to 50-55&#8451;,                  stirring to make it completely dissolved, adding                  ptoluene sulfonic acid, refluxing for 2-5 hours,                  and evaporating the methanol to obtain product,                  (1b) adding product into a container, adding                  methylene dichloride and triethylamine, stirring                  at room temperature, gradually adding acetic                  anhydride, adding N, N-dimethyl pyridine,                  reacting for 7-10 hours, evaporating the                  dichloromethane to obtain intermediate product,                  adding intermediate product dissolved in                  tetrahydrofuran, adding triphenylphosphine and                  p-nitrobenzoic acid, slowly adding diisopropyl                  azodicarboxylate, stirring at room temperature                  under the nitrogen condition for 20-25 hours,                  removing the organic solvent, washing and drying                  to obtain crude product, and (1c) dissolving the                  crude product in methanol, adding sodium                  hydroxide solution, reacting at room temperature                  for 1-3 hours, adding hydrochloric acid solution                  to adjust the pH to 3-4, removing the organic                  solvent, washing and drying. In the method, the                  dosage ratio of the bile extract, anhydrous                  methanol and p-toluenesulfonic acid is (1-5) g:                  (50-100) ml: (0.1-0.3) g. In the preparation                  process of the intermediate product, the dosage                  ratio of the product, dichloromethane,                  triethylamine, acetic anhydride and, N-dimethyl                  pyridine is (1-5) g: (20-30) ml: (3.5-4.3) ml:                  (1.2-1.8) g: (20-40) mg. In the preparation                  method of the crude product, the dosage ratio of                  the intermediate product, tetrahydrofuran,                  triphenylphosphine, p-nitrobenzoic acid and                  diisopropyl azodicarboxylate is (1-3) g: (70-100)                  ml: (1.1-1.5) g: (0.8-1.2) g: (0.2-0.5) g, the                  dosage ratio of the crude product, methanol and                  sodium hydroxide solution is (1-3) g: (20-50) ml:                  (20-30) ml, and the concentration of the sodium                  hydroxide solution is 3-5 wt.%. In the step (2),                  the synthesis method of the chitosan-grafted bile                  acid derivative is as follows: (2a) adding 1-3 g                  chitosan into container, adding 20-30ml acetic                  acid solution, stirring at room temperature for                  30-50 minutes until the system is clear, slowly                  dropping 45-55ml absolute ethanol, adding 8-13g                  hydrophilic bile acid, dissolving in 30-50 ml                  ethanol, slowly dropping into the clear system,                  dissolving 0.6-0.8g                  1-ethyl-(3-dimethylaminopropyl)carbodiimide                  hydrochloride in 6-10ml ethanol, slowly dropping                  into the system, stirring and reacting at room                  temperature for 20-30 hours, (2b) completing the                  reaction, adjusting the pH of the reaction system                  to 7.5-8.5, adding ethanol, centrifuging at                  3500-5000 revolutions/minute for 3-5 minutes,                  repeatedly washing the product with ethanol, and                  freeze-drying for 40-50 hours to obtain                  chitosan-grafted bile acid derivative. In the                  method, the concentration of the acetic acid                  solution is 1-2 wt.%, the adjusting reaction                  system adopts an ethanol/ammonia mixed solution                  with a volume ratio of (7-8):(2-(3). In the step                  (3), the dosage ratio of the silk fibroin to the                  ternary solvent is (10-20) g: (150-200) ml. In                  the ternary solvent, the dosage ratio of calcium                  chloride, ethanol and water is (5-10) g: (30-50)                  ml: (100-150) ml, the mass fraction of the sodium                  alginate solution is 0.5-1%. In the mixed                  solution, the mass ratio of silk fibroin and                  sodium alginate is (60-90): (10-40), and the                  chemical of the mixing liquid is 20-30%.
DC A96 (Medical, dental, veterinary, cosmetic.); B04 (Natural products and polymers. Including testing of body fluids (other than blood typing or cell counting), pharmaceuticals or veterinary compounds of unknown structure, testing of microorganisms for pathogenicity, testing of chemicals for mutagenicity or human toxicity and fermentative production of DNA or RNA. GA 2022A1547U
AB    NOVELTY - A polymer comprises structural units (I)                and/or (II), and at least one structural unit                (III), (IV) or (V).
   USE - Amine-containing polymer used for anion                exchange membrane for fuel cell, electrolyzer,                electrodialyzer, solar hydrogen generator, flow                battery, desalinator, sensor, demineralization of                water, ultra-pure water production, waste water                treatment, ion exchanger, carbon dioxide separator                (all claimed).
   ADVANTAGE - The amine-containing polymer provides the                anion exchange membrane having excellent oxidation                stability.
   DETAILED DESCRIPTION - A polymer comprises structural unit of formula                (I) and/or (II), and at least one structural unit                of formula (III), (IV) or (V).
   A=aryl;
   n=1, 2, 3, or 4;
   m=0, 1, 2, 3 or 4;
   R ,R ,R =alkylene, alkenylene, alkynylene, or                arylene (all optionally substituted with                halide);
   R ,R =NH , -NHR , -NR R , -N-O, -N-S or                nitrogen-containing heterocyclyl;
   R ,R =alkyl, alkenyl, alkynyl or aryl (all                optionally substituted with halide);
   R -R =H, halide, alkyl, alkenyl, alkynyl or                aryl (all optionally substituted with                halide);
   or R +R =five membered ring optionally                substituted with halide or alkyl;
   R ,R =alkylene optionally substituted with                halide or alkyl;and
   Z'=H, hydroxy, oxygen or sulfur.
   INDEPENDENT CLAIMS are included for the                following:
   anion exchange polymer, which comprises a                reaction product of an alkylating agent and the                polymer;
   manufacture of the polymer membrane, which                involves reacting the monomers in the presence of                an organic solvent and a polymerization catalyst to                form the polymer, optionally, reacting the polymer                with the an alkylating agent or amine or phosphine                or a cation containing group, optionally,                exchanging anions of the polymer with hydroxide,                bicarbonate, or carbonate ions or a combination                thereof to form anion exchange polymer membrane,                dissolving the anion exchange polymer membrane in a                solvent to form a polymer solution and casting the                polymer solution to form the polymer membrane;                and
   reinforced electrolyte membrane, which                comprises a porous substrate impregnated with the                polymer.
                                                                                                                     
TF TECHNOLOGY FOCUS - INORGANIC CHEMISTRY - Preferred Components: The base comprises a                  hydroxide-, bicarbonate-, or carbonate-containing                  base. The hydroxide-containing base comprises                  sodium hydroxide or potassium hydroxide and the                  bicarbonate-containing base comprises sodium                  bicarbonate or potassium bicarbonate or the                  carbonate-containing base comprises sodium                  carbonate or potassium carbonate. The porous                  substrate comprises a membrane comprised of                  polytetrafluoroethylene, polypropylene,                  polyethylene, poly(ether) ketone,                  polyaryletherketone, imidazole-tethered poly(aryl                  alkylene), imidazolium-tethered poly(aryl                  alkylene), polysulfone, perfluoroalkoxyalkane, or                  a fluorinated ethylene propylene polymer, and the                  membrane is optionally a dimensionally stable                  membrane. The porous substrate has porous                  microstructure of polymeric fibrils or an                  interior volume of the porous substrate is                  rendered occlusive by impregnation with the                  polymer or the porous substrate comprises a                  microstructure of nodes interconnected by fibrils                  or the porous substrate has a thickness of 1-100                  micron or the membrane is prepared by multiple                  impregnations of the substrate with the polymer                  or wetting the porous substrate in a liquid to                  form a wetted substrate, dissolving the polymer                  in a solvent to form a homogeneous solution,                  applying the solution onto the wetted substrate                  and drying the membrane.                                                                                                                              
   TECHNOLOGY FOCUS - ORGANIC CHEMISTRY - Preferred Components: The polymerization                  catalyst comprises trifluoromethanesulfonic acid,                  pentafluoroethanesulfonic acid,                  heptafluoro-1-propanesulfonic acid,                  trifluoroacetic acid, perfluoropropionic acid,                  heptafluorobutyric acid, or a combination                  thereof. Each of the organic solvents comprises                  dimethyl sulfoxide, 1-methyl-2-pyrrolidinone,                  1-methyl-2-pyrrolidone, dimethylformamide,                  methylene chloride, trifluoroacetic acid,                  trifluoromethanesulfonic acid, chloroform,                  1,1,2,2-tetrachloroethane, dimethylacetamide, or                  a combination thereof. The solvent in the                  dissolving step comprises methanol, ethanol,                  n-propanol, isopropanol, n-butanol, sec-butanol,                  tert-butanol, a pentanol, a hexanol, dimethyl                  sulfoxide, 1-methyl-2-pyrrolidone,                  dimethylformamide, chloroform, ethyl lactate,                  tetrahydrofuran, 2-methyltetrahydrofuran, water,                  phenol, acetone, or a combination thereof.
   TECHNOLOGY FOCUS - POLYMERS - Preferred Components: The molar ratio of sum                  of mole fractions of the structural units (I) and                  (II) to the sum of mole fractions of the                  structural units (III)-(V) in the polymer is                  0.95:1-1.4:1, preferably 1:1-1.2:1 and the ratio                  of the sum of the mole fractions of the                  structural unit (I) and (II) to the sum of the                  mole fractions of the structural unit of formulae                  (III)-(V) is 0.01 to 1.9. The polymer comprises a                  reaction product of a polymerization mixture                  comprising a piperidone monomer of formula (M1),                  a trifluoromethyl ketone monomer of formula (M2),                  at least one aromatic monomer comprising a                  phenyl-based monomer of formula (M3), a nitrogen                  heterocycle-aryl monomer of formula (M4) and an                  aryl monomer having a nitrogen-containing                  substituent of formula (M5). The anion exchange                  polymer comprises a reaction product of an amine                  and the polymer or comprising a reaction product                  of a base and the polymer.
   EXAMPLE - A mixture of 10 ml N-methyl-4-piperidone, 1 g                poly(aryl piperidone) polymer-terphenyl-85-N                polymer and 1.28 g 2,2,6,6-tetramethylpiperidine                multi-quaternary-ammonium side chain were stirred                for 120 hours at 40&#176; C. The reaction                mixture proceeds through a solid-liquid mixture to                a clear yellow solution then ends with a light                yellow N-methyl-4-piperidone solution with crude                product as a light yellow powder or small                particles. The resulted N-methyl-4-piperidone                slurry was added 10 ml acetone, filtered, washed                with acetone and dried at 80&#176; C for                overnight to obtain 2 g poly(aryl piperidone)                polymer with 2,2,6,6-tetramethylpiperidine                multi-quaternary-ammonium polymer with yield of 90%                yield and quaternization yield of 100%.

TI Pipeline system for conveying fluid from source to            destination of mining application and/or hydrocarbon            production application in desert environment, has            fitting body provided with fitting tube, fitting liner            fixed in fitting bore, and liner seal circumferentially            fixed around fitting liner.
AU FRANCIS K S
AE TRINITY BAY EQUIP HOLDINGS LLC (TRIN-Non-standard)
GA 202297208S
AB    NOVELTY - The system has a pipe segment (20) provided                with a tubing that defines a pipe bore. A fluid                conduit is formed in a tubing annulus of the                tubing. A fitting body is provided with a fitting                tube. A grab ring is circumferentially fixed around                the fitting tube. A fitting jacket is                circumferentially fixed around the fitting body to                form a tubing cavity. The tubing of the pipe                segment is inserted into the tubing cavity. A                fitting liner (70A) is fixed in a fitting bore. A                liner seal (86) is circumferentially fixed around                the fitting liner to compress the liner seal                between an inner body surface (63) of the fitting                body and an outer liner surface of the fitting                liner to block slurry from flowing between the                inner body surface of the fitting body and the                outer liner surface of the fitting liner.
   USE - Pipeline system for conveying fluid from a                source to a destination of a mining application                and/or a hydrocarbon production application in a                desert environment. Uses include but are not                limited to hydrocarbons, crude oil, petroleum,                natural gas, fresh water, fracturing fluid,                flow-back fluid and carbon dioxide.
   ADVANTAGE - The fitting liner is secured between the                fitting body and the fitting bore through for                partially covering the fitting body. The system                reduces amount of solid particles (62) in a slurry                for increasing lifespan of the pipe fitting. The                system increases flexibility of the pipe segment                for increasing deployment efficiency.
   DETAILED DESCRIPTION - INDEPENDENT CLAIMS are included for:
   (1) a method for implementing a pipeline                system; and

AB    NOVELTY - A fiber reinforced plastic reinforced bar                comprises a flame retardant aqueous solution                obtained by mixing 5.0-30.0 wt.% flame retardant                and 1.0-10.0 wt.% viscosity modifier to 100 wt.%                thermosetting resin, a reinforcing fiber chosen                from glass fiber, granite fiber, carbon fiber,                silicon fiber, aramid fiber, boron fiber,                nylon-based fiber and fibers impregnated in the                solution, a surface protective film provided to                surround and protect the outer peripheral surface                of the reinforcing fiber, and an inorganic powder                and fine aggregates adhered to and hardened to                increase adhesion to concrete on the surface                protective film.    ADVANTAGE - The fiber reinforced plastic reinforcing bar                has excellent flame retardance, adhesiveness to                concrete and durability and can prevent fire                secondary damage in advance by minimizing                combustion by blocking oxygen supply by generating                carbon dioxide and water when reinforcing bars are                exposed to fire. When the reinforced bar is used as                substitute for reinforcing bars in structures such                as concrete, the rough surface of the flame                retardant material improves adhesiveness to                concrete, and by improving the method of tying the                reinforcing fiber yarns into one when manufacturing                reinforcing bars, there is an effect of reducing                space and improving maintenance by simplifying the                molding equipment and continuity of the                manufacturing process.

AU ZHENG J
   ZHANG Q
   ZHANG J
   YUAN W
   HUANG W
   WANG Y
   FAN X
AE XINXING WEIFENG AGRIC TECHNOLOGY CO LTD (XINX-Non-standard)
   UNIV SOUTH CHINA AGRIC (USCG-C)
GA 202294902H
AB    NOVELTY - Preparing structure color hydrogel film,                involves (i) preparing silicon dioxide nano                microsphere suspension, (ii) uniformly spraying the                silicon dioxide nanosphere suspension on the                surface of the inorganic glass to form an amorphous                structure template, (iii) uniformly mixing the                monomer, initiator, crosslinking agent, response                substance and ethanol to obtain a precursor                solution, (iv) filling the precursor solution in                the amorphously structure template, curing under                ultraviolet light, and soaking by hydrofluoric acid                solution, and (v) washing the material with ammonia                water and soaking in water to obtain the non-angle                dependent structure color water gel film.
   USE - Method for preparing structure color hydrogel                film without angle dependency used in food                intelligent packaging and transportation and other                related fields.
   ADVANTAGE - The preparation method is simple and                controllable, and the prepared structural color                material has good optical properties and no angle                dependence.
   DETAILED DESCRIPTION - INDEPENDENT CLAIMS are included for:
   An angle-independent structural color hydrogel                film prepared by the preparation method, where the                pH value in the solution increased in the range of                3-11, the color shifts blue. The color shifts red                as the CO2 gas concentration increased in the range                of 0-50%.
   An application of angle-independent structural                color hydrogel film, which involves: preparing                phosphate buffer solution, 0.1 mol/L hydrochloric                acid solution and 0.1 mol/L sodium hydroxide                solution, and using the above three solutions to                prepare buffers with different pH solution. The                prepared angle-independent structural color                hydrogel film was completely immersed in the buffer                solution. The color change of the structural color                hydrogel film is observed, and the spectral data                was collected by a fiber optic spectrometer. The                structural color hydrogel film is put into 3 mL                pure water with air pressure balance, to prepare                different concentrations of carbon dioxide (CO2)                gas by the air conditioner, and extracted 3 mL CO2                gas with different concentrations.
TF TECHNOLOGY FOCUS - POLYMERS - Preferred Conditions: The particle size of                  silica (SiO2) nano-microsphere is 100-380 nm. The inorganic glass are                  soaked uniformly in the Piranha solution, and                  taken out the inorganic glass and rinsed it,                  after 24 hours. The mixing is performed under                  ultrasonic conditions for 10-30 minutes, and the                  power is 100-300 watt. The curing time is 60-180                  minutes.
   TECHNOLOGY FOCUS - ORGANIC CHEMISTRY - Preferred Components: The monomer is methyl                  methacrylate and hydroxyethyl methacrylate. The                  initiator is benzoin diethyl ether. The                  responsive substance is dimethylaminoethyl                  methacrylate.

PT P
PN CN114438385-A
TI Preparing metal titanium particle reinforced            magnesium-based composite material for use in            automobile field, involves stirring and casting            molding, adding titanium particle prefabricated body or            aluminum foil coated titanium particle stack to            magnesium melt, and cooling.
AU PAN F
   LI J
   YE J
   CHEN X
AE UNIV CHONGQING (UYCQ-C)
GA 202266476A
AB    NOVELTY - Preparing metal titanium particle reinforced                magnesium-based composite material involves adding                titanium particle prefabricated body or titanium                particle laminated layer coated by aluminum foil                into magnesium melt, preserving heat for 5-10                minutes, cooling to form semi-solid magnesium melt,                stirring for 5-20 minutes, heating to form liquid                magnesium melt, performing ultrasonic treatment,                and cooling by water to obtain cast titanium                particle reinforced magnesium-based composite                material. The cast titanium particle reinforced                magnesium-based composite material material is                pre-treated and extruded to obtain metal titanium                particle reinforced magnesium-based composite                material.
   USE - Method for preparing metal titanium particle                reinforced magnesium-based composite material for                use in automobile, war industry, and aerospace                field.
   ADVANTAGE - The method enables to solve the problems that                metal titanium particles are difficult to add,                dispersion is uneven, and comprehensive mechanical                property of the magnesium-based composite material                is poor. The magnesium alloy is melted in a                stirring device filled with carbon dioxide and                sulfur hexafluoride protective gas, and titanium                particle prefabricated body or titanium particle                lamination layer coated by aluminum foil is added,                so that the burning loss of the titanium particles                is avoided. The mechanical stirring, ultrasonic                treatment and rapid cooling are applied, so that                the titanium particles is uniformly dispersed, and                sedimentation of the titanium particles is avoided.                The titanium particle reinforced magnesium-based                composite material is subjected to hot extrusion                deformation, and titanium particles are further                dispersed. The titanium particles prevents the                crystal grain size from growing in the hot                extrusion deformation process, and simultaneously,                strength and the plasticity of composite material                are improved. The titanium particles weakens the                basal plane texture of the composite material, and                plasticity of the composite material is effectively                improved. The magnesium-based composite material                prepared by the method has higher strength and                plasticity compared with a matrix alloy,.
TF TECHNOLOGY FOCUS - METALLURGY - Preferred Conditions: The particle size of                  the titanium particles is 70 nanometer (nm)-50                  microns (mum), particle size of magnesium chips                  is 50-100 mum, and mass ratio of titanium                  particles to the magnesium chips is 1:1-1:5. The                  specific conditions of the mechanical ball                  milling are stainless steel balls with the                  diameter of 5 mm are used as grinding balls,                  ball-material ratio is 5-10:1, rotating speed                  during ball milling is 80 revolutions/minute                  (rpm), and ball milling time is 60-120 minutes.                  The aluminum foil has a thickness of 0.01-0.02 mm                  and a width of 200-300 mm, and titanium particles                  laid on the aluminum foil have a thickness of                  0.2-0.5 mm. The mass ratio of the titanium                  particles to the magnesium melt in the titanium                  particle preform or the aluminum foil-coated                  titanium particle laminate is                  1:999-100:900.Preferred Process: The titanium particle                  preform is produced by carrying out mechanical                  ball milling on the titanium particles and the                  magnesium chips under the protection of argon to                  obtain mixed powder of the titanium particles and                  the magnesium chips, and carrying out cold press                  molding. The cold press molding is carried out                  specifically by carrying out cold press molding                  under the pressure of 100-200 megapascal (MPa)                  and maintaining under the pressure condition for                  0.5-2 minutes to obtain a prefabricated body of                  pre-dispersed titanium carbide particles. The                  aluminum foil-coated titanium particle laminate                  is prepared by laying titanium particles with the                  particle size of 70 nm-50 mum uniformly on an                  aluminum foil and folding into a slender                  strip.

TF TECHNOLOGY FOCUS - BIOLOGY - Preferred Process: The Hypho culture medium                  of mixed carbon source, comprises the steps: The                  solution of macroelement A is prepared by adding                  Dipotassium hydrogen phosphate (K2HPO4) and                  sodiumdihydrogen phosphate (NaH2PO4) to water,                  the final concentration of K2HPO4is 5-5.2                  grams/liter (g/L), and the final concentration of                  NaH2PO4is 2.4-2.6 g/L. The large amount of                  element B solution is prepared by adding                  magnesium sulfate heptahydrate (MgSO4.7H2O) and                  ammonium sulfate (NH4)2SO4to water, the final                  concentration of MgSO4.7H2O is 0.3-0.5g/L, and                  the final concentration of (NH4)2SO4is 0.8-1g/L.                  The trace element A solution is prepared by                  adding sodium Ethylenediaminetetraacetic acid                  (Na2EDTA) and ferrous FeSO4.7H2O to water, the                  final concentration of Na2EDTA is 8-10g/L, and                  the final concentration of FeSO4.7H2O is                  0.8-1g/L, adjust pH to 3-4 with 1M sodium                  hydroxide (NaOH). The trace element B solution is                  prepared by adding calcium chloride dihydrate                  (CaCl2.2H2O), manganese chloride tetrahydrate                  (MnCl2.4H2O), Sodium molybdate dihydrate                  (Na2MoO4.2H2O), copper sulfate pentahydrate                  (CuSO4.5H2O), cobalt chloride hexahydrate                  (CoCl2.6H2O), zinc chloride heptahydrate                  (ZnSO4.7H2O) to water, the final concentration of                  CaCl2.2H2O is 1.2-1.6g/L. The final concentration                  of MnCl2.4H2O is 0.5-1g/L, the final                  concentration of Na2MoO4.2H2O is 0.2-0.5g/L, the                  final concentration of CuSO4.5H2O is 0.2-0.5g/L,                  and the final concentration of CoCl2.6H2O is                  1.2-1.8g/L L, the final concentration of                  ZnSO4.7H2O is 4-4.5g/L, and the pH is adjusted to                  1-2 with hydrochloric acid (HCl). The                  macroelement A solution and the macroelement B                  solution are mixed, according to a mass ratio of                  1:1 to obtain a mixed solution. The trace element                  A solution and the trace element B solution are                  mixed with the mixed solution in a mass ratio of                  1:1:1000, and then methanol and formic acid are                  added as a carbon source in proportion to obtain                  Hypho medium with methanol and formic acid as                  mixed carbon sources.

PN CN113875593-A
TI Improving Nantian bamboo rooting rate by preparing            complete Nantian bamboo, selecting organs, tissues,            cells and protoplast of plant, performing annual stable            production, dedifferentiating differentiated cells,            forming single cell from callus, and growing to            plant.
AU YANG S
   WANG F
   CHEN F
   CHEN X
AE HANGZHOU MUMU BIOTECHNOLOGY CO LTD (HANG-Non-standard)
GA 2022112952
AB    NOVELTY - Sugar-free tissue culture method for improving                Nantian bamboo rooting rate involves preparing                complete Nantian bamboo, selecting organs (e.g.                root, stem, leave, flower, fruit and seeds),                tissues (e.g. cambium and anther tissues), cells                (e.g. somatic cells and germ cells) and protoplast                of the plant for stereoscopic process, performing                annual stable production through manual or                automatic regulation of the entire culture room                environment for every year, dedifferentiating some                differentiated cells into parenchyma with                meristematic ability after the induction of                cytokinin, forming a callus of the implant, forming                the callus from complete plantlet in the young root                and shoot at differentiation point under a certain                culture, separating cells from original organs and                tissues to become free state under certain                conditions, expressing totipotency of the cells,                forming single cell from the callus to embryoid,                and growing into complete plant.
   USE - The sugar-free tissue culture method is useful                for improving Nantian bamboo rooting rate.
   ADVANTAGE - The method enables to improve Nantian bamboo                rooting rate of sugar-free tissue culture, which                solves problem of the existing method and device                for improving bamboo root-planting survival rate                without sugar tissue culture method, and is mixed                with multiple kinds of soil adjusting agent, so as                to reach the effect of the test tube seedling net                photosynthetic rate is the highest. The forced                ventilation system supplies the carbon dioxide                needed by the growth of the small plant under                action of the ventilating film, and promotes                photosynthesis of plant for autotrophic growth, to                reach effect of rooting rate and transplanting                survival rate.
   DETAILED DESCRIPTION - An INDEPENDENT CLAIM is included for                sugar-free tissue culture device, which comprises a                culturing container, where the interior of                culturing container is provided with soil                substrate, water-absorbing sponge, an induction                nozzle, an induction lamp and a constant                temperature system.
TF TECHNOLOGY FOCUS - AGRICULTURE - Preferred Method: The method involves                  selecting fertile, moist and well-drained                  slightly acidic or neutral fertile soil,                  indicating plants of limestone mountain and                  calcareous soil, mixing the soil, adjusting with                  a variety of soil, maintaining moisture in soil,                  following the principle of see dry and see wet                  for watering, frequently watering in dry season,                  watering once a day in summer, spraying the                  leaves for 2-3 times, allowing attention not to                  water during flowering, otherwise it cause                  flowers to fall or lead to less fruit, where the                  plants are in a semi-dormant state in winter,                  appropriately reducing watering process,                  selecting planting environment with shade, which                  makes bamboo stems and leaves grow longer, and                  the seed-setting rate decreases, selecting                  suitable growth temperature of 20degrees Celsius,                  where the suitable temperature for flowering and                  fruiting is 24-25degrees Celsius, allowing                  attention to maintain warm when breeding in                  winter, preferably when the temperature is less                  than 8degrees Celsius, applying thin fertilizer                  for every half a month during the growth period                  of seedlings, ensuring beautiful plant shape,                  flowering and fruiting, focusing attention to                  pruning when cultivating, mainly in the growing                  period to cut off the root sprout branches and                  dense branches, and cut off the branches with                  longer fruit ears, performing in spring or                  autumn, when transplanting, selecting medium and                  small seedlings, if there is no soil ball, the                  roots are coated with mud, and most of the leaves                  should be cut off, changing pot once every 5                  years, if the root system is crowded, it is                  divided in the spring when the pot is changed,                  and propagating bamboo by sowing, cutting,                  division and other methods. Preferred Components:                  The outside of culture container is provided with                  forced ventilation system, breathable membrane, a                  water outlet, an outdoor temperature sensor and a                  control center. The forced ventilation system and                  breathable membrane are arranged in culture                  container. The drain port is arranged at the                  bottom of the culture container. The control                  center is connected with forced ventilation                  system, induction nozzle, an induction lamp, an                  outdoor temperature measurement sensor and a                  constant temperature system. The substrate in the                  soil substrate is vermiculite.
